description: FU-515 Phase D-b: incremental embed of 700 附則 (SupplProvision) TableStruct chunks on top of aug-v6, then measure whether 附則 injection degrades existing retrieval (the core 採否 question). 附則 tables concentrate 445 in shotoku-zei-hou, a corpus-noise concern that held them back from D-a. Verdict is REJECT (pre-authorized): zero regression confirmed, but 附則 retrieval value did not clear the locked acceptance bar. aug-v6 stays canonical; aug-v7 is NOT promoted.
verdict_detail: 退行ゼロ (G1/G1b/G1-local/G2 すべて v7==v6・noise 懸念は解消) だが、附則 value がロック採用基準 (G3-sp straight+paraphrase 両方 rank<=5) に未達 (A-straight rank2 のみ hit / A-paraphrase rank11 / B-straight rank6 / B-paraphrase rank17)。semantic (口語パラフレーズ) retrieval が canonical 昇格を正当化するに不十分。aug-v6 据え置き・附則は既定 OFF。事前承認済みの正当な REJECT (briefing §5)。

corpus_delta_v7_v6.notes: All 700 new chunk_ids are segment_type=table and supplproviso-derived (no main/kou contamination). Verified by D-b-0 pre-check + write-zero tripwire (remaining==700) before the paid Gemini call.

tripwire.method: write-zero standalone set-diff (embed.py NOT invoked) before paid Gemini call

vector_health_v7.notes: embed.py has no provider auto-fallback (gemini failure raises), so gemini->tfidf chimera is structurally impossible; remaining risk is degenerate (NaN/zero) responses, which these checks rule out. gemini-embedding-001 returns L2-normalized vectors.

G1_no_regression_aggregate.eval_set: data/eval-set/ full union (D-a と同一母数; 新設サブディレクトリは top-level glob 外)
G1_no_regression_aggregate.note: v7 identical to v6 across all R@k and MRR. The 700 附則 table chunks displaced no existing gold answer.

G1_local_search_jack_detection.n_discrepancy_note: Lock plan §2 assumed N=16 = 既存6 (shotoku本則2 + chihou本則4) + 新規10. Actual eval-set audit found only 1 existing shotoku 本則 query (eval-tax-002 = shotoku-zei-hou-art-28, identical to new query #1); existing chihou 本則 = 0 (tax-table chihou/shotoku refs are 施行令/施行規則, not 本則). The 'existing 6' is a §2 prose miscount; it does NOT touch any LOCKED expected value (§1 14 items). The REJECT threshold is an ABSOLUTE count (>=2), so it is robust to N. Actual母数 N=10 reported honestly (W4/W10).
G1_local_search_jack_detection.scoring: primary single gold (AC-10: #4 primary=120, #5 primary=183; related 125/127/184 are non-scoring context to detect 本則喪失)
G1_local_search_jack_detection.note: shotoku-zei-hou 445 附則 table の検索ジャック懸念は否定された。全 10 本則 primary の rank が v6->v7 で不変。

G3_sp_supplproviso_value_probe.method: gold = chunk_id; record REAL rank in v7 (binary R@5 retired, AC-9); 附則 chunk は v7 のみ存在ゆえ v7 絶対 rank で評価
G3_sp_supplproviso_value_probe.note: 附則 table はストレートな表現では引ける (A-straight は親 chunk art4-p1 の直後 rank2)。だが口語パラフレーズでは届かない (rank 11/17)。exact-match 残響でなく真の semantic retrieval を測る paraphrase 基準 (AC-4) を満たさず、附則 value はロック採用バーに未達。

acceptance_criteria.accept_if: G1 no-regression (dMRR>=0 & net_balance>=0) AND G1b top3->out==0 AND G1-local R@3-drop<2 AND G2 R@3>=0.833 AND G3-sp locked probes (straight+paraphrase) hit@5

decision.aug_v7_disposition: build/ local only (gitignored), NOT committed, NOT set as retrieve default; 附則 既定 OFF
decision.key_finding: noise 懸念 (shotoku 445 集中による既存劣化) は完全に否定された (zero regression)。これは将来 附則を再投入する際の安全側の根拠。ただし現状の dense-only パイプラインでは 附則 table の semantic (paraphrase) retrieval が弱く、canonical 昇格の便益は実証されない。
decision.followup: FU-515 残課題: 附則 table の retrieval 価値を高める手段 (reranker / chunk augmentation の見直し / 附則専用 prefix) を D-c 候補として検討。再投入時は本 D-b の eval-set (G1-local + G3-sp) と checksum ゲートをそのまま流用可能。

reproducibility.embed_cmd: python tools/embed/embed.py --provider gemini --gemini-model gemini-embedding-001 --input build/corpus-v0.2-augmented-v6.jsonl --output build/embeddings/v0.2-aug-v7-gemini  (auto-resume via seeded v7 path; NOTE: embed.py has no --resume flag, resume is automatic when output artefacts exist)
reproducibility.golden_checksum_gate: tools/scripts/verify-eval-set-checksum.py (CI; expected SHA256 in repo variable EVALSET_GOLDEN_SHA256, out of agent write scope)
